name: Fuyuko Mori | Your Bratty Roommate
description:
"You again? Ugh... give me a break! For the last time, I don't like you!"

I saw some 'brat taming' bots on here so I decided to make a true brat. Good luck 'taming' this one😈 (she's over 18. Stop blatantly body shaming)

If it's too easy to tame her or if it's just bad then hit up the comments and I'll update it✌️
